ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the league is organized */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  "league_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "league_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "match_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and field conditions */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the match report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the performance is recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Calculated win percentage */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "player_contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience coaching */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
